notes: These are structured contract cases. Use scripts/normalize-review-json.py, scripts/validate-experience-packets.py, and scripts/merge-evidence-packets.py for executable smoke checks.

cases.name: obstruction_candidate_routes_to_screenwalk
cases.input_hint: timeline issue mentions tooltip obstruction or visual blocking

cases.name: compound_issue_is_blocked_before_repair
cases.input_hint: one timeline issue combines obstruction and CTA distance with two fixes

cases.name: adapter_injects_source_hints
cases.input_hint: project adapter contains Source Hints keys matching category, issue_type, or journey_step
assertions: source_hints entries have kind in code-path,asset,config

cases.name: cross_skill_duplicate_merge_preserves_traceability
cases.input_hint: one SW packet and one EC packet share surface_type, category, and overlapping bbox or timestamp
assertions: merged output contains one packet for the duplicate issue

cases.name: multi_clip_review_creates_owner_brief_before_repair
cases.input_hint: three short game clips reviewed by Gemini or manual reviewer with normalized EC packets
assertions: brief includes clip paths and representative screenshot/keyframe paths
brief groups candidate decisions for owner review
no product code edits occur before owner-selected issue IDs
